states.name: Shirra
states.title: Mistress of the Butterflies
states.description: Sorcerers specialize in fields. Some prefer fire. Some like healing. Some study illusions. Shirra practices insectomancy, an ancient, dead form of magic based around summoning, controlling, and speaking to insects.

states.name: Shirra
states.title: Mistress of the Butterflies
states.description: In sorcery college, the other students teased her. "What use is studying bugs? You can summon termites that can eat a house in 20 years. We can summon fire that'll devour it in minutes!" Shirra would simply smile and shrug, shaking off the criticism.

states.name: Shirra
states.title: Mistress of the Butterflies
states.description: Now, Shirra has become Erden's most renowned spymaster. She has a network of over 10 quintillion tiny spies, who can get into the smallest places and go unnoticed by humans, elves, and kud alike. Her services are in great demand.
